hero.subheadline: No meditation. No music. A precise external regulator for your nervous system – built on validated psychoacoustic principles.

problem.headline: The open filter
problem.body1: The neurodivergent brain has no automatic gate between stimulus and perception. Sound, light, thoughts – everything arrives simultaneously and unfiltered.
problem.body2: The result: you filter consciously. That costs massive energy. By afternoon your mental battery is empty – not from work, but from the heavy labour of sensory processing.
problem.quote: "Instead of cognitive compensation, AuDHD-Flow provides physiological relief – bottom-up instead of top-down."

stats.text: of the population with combined AuDHD profile – barely addressed.
increased sensory processing load compared to neurotypical individuals.
apps on the market addressing ADHD stimulation AND autism predictability simultaneously.

items.name: BASIS
items.desc: Pink noise with the mathematical structure of natural sounds. Masks ambient noise – your brain stops scanning the environment. Acoustic immune system.

items.name: FOKUS
items.desc: Binaural beat in beta range. Like glasses for the frontal lobe. For admin, email, complex tasks.

items.name: RUHE
items.desc: Alpha entrainment for relaxed alertness. Between focus and rest – ideal for creative work.

items.name: MEDITATION
items.desc: Theta induction for deep relaxation. Anxiety relief and transition to quieter states of consciousness.

items.name: ABEND
items.desc: Delta frequencies for the transition to sleep. Gently powering down the nervous system.

items.name: SAFE SPACE
items.desc: The emergency button. Brown noise + heartbeat at 58 BPM (vagus nerve stimulation). When everything becomes too much, this mode mechanically slows your pulse. Radical stillness – no surprises.

principles.title: Stochastic Resonance
principles.body: Moderate background noise significantly improves cognitive performance at low dopaminergic activity – by raising the signal threshold. (Sikström et al.)

principles.title: Brainwave Entrainment
principles.body: The brain synchronises to rhythmic external stimuli (frequency following response). EEG studies confirm inducibility of beta, alpha and theta waves. (Huang & Charyton)

principles.title: Lossless Audio
principles.body: The neurodivergent brain unconsciously registers MP3 compression artefacts as stress. AuDHD-Flow generates mathematically pure sine waves in real time via Web Audio API.

paradox.title: The AuDHD Paradox
paradox.subtitle: Two opposing needs – one architecture.
paradox.solutionDesc: LFO modulation (stimulation) + Gapless looping (stillness) + 58 BPM heartbeat (vagal)

items.title: Headphones Required
items.desc: Only in-ear or noise-cancelling creates the closed acoustic space required for binaural effect.

items.title: Lossless Audio
items.desc: No MP3. Real-time oscillators via Web Audio API. Mathematically pure sine waves – zero compression artefacts.

items.title: No Tracking
items.desc: No analytics, no forced subscription, no third-party data. The app works completely offline.

Choose mode.
Let go.
